expectations.text: Reports status for multiple automation systems
expectations.evidence: Reports on all 5 systems: Tax PDF Organizer, Media Organizer, Monarch Money, Treehouse Context Sync, Notion Rules

expectations.text: Shows running/idle/stale/down status for each system
expectations.evidence: Shows Running, Idle, Connected, Synced status indicators matching the skill's status categories
Notes that Media Organizer is idle and explains this is normal, clarifying no systems need attention

expectations.text: Presents results in a dashboard or summary format
expectations.evidence: Uses a formatted table with System/Status/Details columns and a summary section
